memory.summary: Friends are inviting me out tonight, but my midterm is tomorrow and I'm only 60% through review.
I pushed through the social invitation to finish studying, increasing my midterm readiness to 78% but missing the chance to go out with friends.
My midterm readiness has jumped from 78% to 92% after two hours of focused study, bringing me very close to fully prepared.
My midterm study is now complete, so I can finally relax or socialize without worrying about being unprepared.
I am now fully prepared for the midterm with 92% readiness and high energy, so I can relax or socialize without worry.
With my midterm preparation complete and high energy, joining the social club was a successful way to relax. The group's welcome confirms this is a good use of my free time.
Since my midterm study is complete and I have high energy, I can fully relax or socialize without any academic worries.
